name: software-framework
description: Software engineering meta-router — 12 frameworks (Scientific Debugging, Bisection, Observability, Hexagonal, DDD, Event Sourcing/CQRS, Modular Monolith, SOLID, 12-Factor, Resilience Patterns, Strangler Fig, Team Topologies). Built on real Korean growth scenarios (Toss, Kakao, Coupang, Naver) and regulatory context (FSC, 전자금융업, PG). Invoke /code.
